title: Step 2: Update the Azure credentials.
description:
You can use a customer-managed key (CMK) from Azure Key Vault (AKV)
to further encrypt your data at rest in Atlas. This page describes
how to configure customer key management using AKV (Azure Key Vault) on your Atlas
project and on the clusters in that project.

headings.text: Enable Customer-Managed Keys for a Project
Enable Customer Key Management for an Atlas Cluster
Disable Customer-Managed Keys for a Project
Revoke Access to an Encryption Key
